channel.title: SaaSVerdict Lab Updates
channel.description: Monthly benchmark releases, pricing playbooks, methodology updates, and evidence workflow tooling.

item.title: Multilogin API Knowledge Hub Conversion Wave Published
item.description: New large-scale conversion wave with 7 category hubs, 49 rewritten API playbooks, and 606 local SEO-renamed reference images.

item.title: Getting Started Roadmap Guide Published
item.description: New 14-day onboarding roadmap from account setup to stable pilot with acceptance gates and evidence checkpoints.

item.title: Workspace and Token Setup Runbook Published
item.description: Access-governance guide for workspace IDs, user IDs, token lifecycle controls, and audit-ready automation logging.

item.title: Multilogin X Script Runner Playbook Published
item.description: Batch execution playbook with payload schema controls, failure thresholds, and quarantine strategy for safer script operations.

item.title: OpenMultiLogin Risk and Migration Guide Published
item.description: Risk scoring and phased migration framework for teams evaluating fork-based workflows versus managed operations paths.

item.title: Open-Source Blueprints Hub Published
item.description: New cluster converting open-source repository themes into production guides for SDK integration, cookie workflow governance, and proxy bootstrap reliability.

item.title: Laravel Multilogin SDK Playbook Released
item.description: Queue-safe Laravel implementation guide for profile lifecycle orchestration, timeout policy, and deterministic cleanup controls.

item.title: Cookie Automation Runbook Released
item.description: Evidence-first cookie workflow guide covering metadata normalization, repeated-session acceptance gates, and rollback checkpoints.

item.title: Proxy Profile Bootstrap Playbook Released
item.description: Proxy quality contract and profile bootstrap SOP with health-gate, quarantine lane, and drift-control guidance for scale operations.

item.title: May 2026 Benchmark Preview Published
item.description: Early May reliability trend preview across 22 platforms with delta matrix versus April baseline and release-gate checks.

item.title: Best Multilogin Alternatives Page Published
item.description: New high-intent shortlist page mapping Multilogin alternatives by risk profile, API readiness, and operating cost checks.

item.title: Antidetect Browser Pricing Playbook Released
item.description: Decision framework for monthly versus annual plans using total cost, failure overhead, and governance risk modeling.

item.title: Benchmark Release Checker Added
item.description: Free publish-gate tool to validate monthly benchmark readiness before release.

item.title: Benchmark Report Template Published
item.description: Reusable monthly benchmark release blueprint with evidence gates, YAML front-matter, and traceability checklist.

item.title: April 2026 Benchmark Baseline Released
item.description: First full monthly baseline under methodology v1.2 with evidence-level annotations and drift notes.

item.title: Methodology v1.2 Changelog Published
item.description: Public version history for scoring changes, blocker updates, and impact notes.

item.title: Evidence Pack Builder Added
item.description: Free tool for generating SOP-ready YAML evidence packages before recommendation or procurement approval.
